name: Rosato’s
tagline: A family-friendly bar serving great food.
footerLine: Good food. Friendly service. Right in the heart of Moville.

address.landmark: You’ll find us on Malin Road, just a short walk from Moville town centre.

bookingNote: Bookings are for indoor dining only. Outdoor seating is walk-in.
bookingEnquiry: Planning a meal or organising a group? Give us a call or send us an email and we’ll be happy to help.
hoursSummary: Kitchen from 16:00 weekdays · from 15:00 Sat · from 12:30 Sun

room.title: Great food, good company and a warm welcome.
room.body: A favourite with locals, a welcome stop for visitors, and a place where good food brings people together.
room.imageAlt: Open fire in the stone hearth at Rosato’s, with the bar in the foreground

pint.title: Great pints.
pint.body: Good things come to those who wait…
pint.imageAlt: A pint of Guinness on the bar at Rosato’s

visit.title: Everything you need before you visit.
visit.parkingTip: Street parking along Malin Road; easier after the school run.

ordering.title: Make it your own with extra toppings or leave off anything you don’t fancy.
ordering.intro: Order online, customise your pizza and collect from Rosato’s. No delivery — pick up at the bar.
ordering.payNote: Pay when you collect — card or cash.
ordering.successMessage: Order received. We’ll have it ready for collection.
